description: A horizontal memorial graphic. Large white serif text on the left reads Wall of Honor beside a small blue ribbon with an ICE badge logo. Below it, smaller text reads Customs Officer Daniel A. Romberger, End of Watch, Monday, April 25, 1932. The center shows a close-up of a gold law-enforcement badge inscribed U.S. Customs, The Department of the Treasury, and Customs Officer. The right side shows red roses in front of a U.S. flag.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Customs Officer Daniel A. Romberger; End of Watch; Monday, April 25, 1932; U.S. CUSTOMS; THE DEPARTMENT OF THE TREASURY; CUSTOMS OFFICER
